summary: Bulk remove company users from projects
description: This endpoint allows company users to be bulk removed from multiple projects.

{user_id}.description: Maps project IDs to operation result status

users.description: Array of existing company users with a project id that they will be removed from. The maximum amount per request is 50 user_id, project_id duplets. If more than 50 objects are sent then a worker wi...

user_id.description: The ID of the user to remove

project_id.description: The ID of project to add the user to remove from
